metadata.name: Flexis swarm in Martins pond [not yet a boid implementation] (Se7enSlasher's Full Random Texture Mix)
metadata.author: martin
metadata.source: martin - Flexis swarm in Martins pond [not yet a boid implementation] (Se7enSlasher's Full Random Texture Mix).milk

perFrameCode: nn = 3; // number of nearest neighbors to search, reduce if not needed
// provide enough attributes, otherwise the next object's coordinate will be overwritten
// collision detection is based on nearest neighbors, so keep it at least at 1.
check = 2; // how many neighbors will be checked for a possible collision. may not be above nn.
// raise to avoid odd behavior in clusters of touching objects.
rotatefactor = 0.0; // relation between angular and translative momentum, when object hits a border. this is an empirical value for a convincing impression
v = sqrt( sqr( gmegabuf(index + 2) ) + sqr( gmegabuf(index + 3) ) );
vr = sin(gmegabuf(index+10))*gmegabuf(index+4); // rotation speed at the surface
vr = if( bounce, vr - (gmegabuf(index+2) + vr)*(1-rotatefactor), vr);
gmegabuf(index+3) = if( bounce, abs(gmegabuf(index+3))*dampening + shock, gmegabuf(index+3));
vr = if( bounce, vr + (gmegabuf(index+2) - vr)*(1-rotatefactor), vr);
vr = if( bounce, vr + (gmegabuf(index+3) - vr)*(1-rotatefactor), vr);
gmegabuf(index+2) = if( bounce, abs(gmegabuf(index+2))*dampening + shock, gmegabuf(index+2));
vr = if( bounce, vr - (gmegabuf(index+3) + vr)*(1-rotatefactor), vr);
i = 0; j = 0; // collecting pairs of index and distance to the current object in a local buffer
d = if( equal(d,0), 10, d); // leave out comparison with itself (where d == 0, set d to a high value)
d = d - (gmegabuf(index+4)+gmegabuf(i+4))*0.5; // subtract radius (surface to surface distance)
i = 0; // sort that buffer, but only as many cycles as needed for the _nn_ nearest neighbors
i = 0; // storing the indexes of the nearest neighbors in the list
i = 0; // collision detection and impulse transmission below
hit = below( sqrt( sqr( gmegabuf(index) - gmegabuf(index2)) +
ref_ang = atan2( gmegabuf(index2)-gmegabuf(index), // calculating the angle of the common tangent
v1 = sqrt(sqr( gmegabuf(index + 2)) + sqr( gmegabuf(index + 3))); // velocity of object1
v2 = sqrt(sqr( gmegabuf(index2 + 2)) + sqr( gmegabuf(index2 + 3)));  // velocity of object2
w1 = atan2( gmegabuf(index + 2), gmegabuf(index + 3));   // object1 motion angle
w2 = atan2( gmegabuf(index2 + 2), gmegabuf(index2 + 3)); // object2 motion angle
vr2 = sin(gmegabuf(index2 + 10))*gmegabuf(index2+4); // the other object's surface velocity
perFrameInitCode: nListStart = 24; // starting index of neighbor list
